race.comment: TICKLE ME PINK (10) was ridden more aggressively last start when second-up from a spell and responded by going within a whisker of scoring over 1350m at the Beaumont track. Strips fitter and enjoys racing on this circuit. Looks the testing material. YOU'RE THE CHOICE (15) bolted in first-up at Gosford then was in the firing line all the way before finishing third over 1200m at Kembla last time out. New to this trip but it looks the right move at the third run back. CUBAN CIGAR (6) defeated the well-performed Satness at Kembla two runs ago but was outclassed in town most recently. In the mix back in this more suitable contest. OAKFIELD BADGER (1) has been in the money at his last couple, both BM82 sprints in the country. Goes best for Aaron Bullock who is back in the saddle. Big chance despite the huge weight. VIA FLAMINIA (13) is a lightly raced filly back from a 24-week spell. Gets plenty of weight off some key rivals and is capable of a big run while fresh.
